title: sabina alba
intro: Sabina alba, also known as Juniperus sabina or Sabina, is a small, shrubby evergreen tree that belongs to the cypress family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include acting as a diuretic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Sabina alba include relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as treating urinary problems and skin conditions. Sabina alba is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestive health and relieve symptoms of menopause.
